method: Cardinality-aware additivity bound extending additivity_risk (magnitude/saturation channel) with a DIRECTIONAL channel.
model: Incoherent-sum: additive signal ~ sqrt(k), pairwise interaction ~ sqrt(C(k,2))*d_pp; retention = cos(additive,measured) = sig/sqrt(sig^2+inter^2).
conservatism_caveat: Norman 2019 doubles were SELECTED for epistasis, so per-pair interaction here is an UPPER estimate; recipes built on functionally diverse (non-epistatic) generators will retain MORE directional fidelity than this bound. Treat the curve as a conservative floor.
usage: Multiply a recipe's reachable-cosine confidence by additive_dir_retention(k) for a cardinality-penalized deliverability estimate; combine with additivity_risk() for the magnitude channel.
